articles_triggered.title: Classification Rules for High-Risk AI Systems
articles_triggered.status: applicable — system may meet high-risk criteria

ai_act_assessment.assessment_notes: System performs autonomous vulnerability research and exploitation on authorized targets. If findings include AI-specific attack vectors (injection, poisoning, drift), the system itself may be a high-risk AI system under EU AI Act Annex III.

finding.description: RCE as asterisk via FreePBX SQLi → cron
